case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. AUGUSTINE CARLOS QUINTANA JR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2019 - CONTINUED TO OCT-24-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
